title: Laravel: request.handled
description: An HTTP request handled by a Laravel controller. Emitted by RequestHandled after the response is sent.

duration.description: Duration in microseconds. The client emits a string with ms suffix (e.g. "5.123ms"); the ingestion pipeline converts it to microseconds.

routeName.description: Named route, if one is defined.

requestId.description: Request ID from the X-Request-Id or Request-Id header, or a generated UUID. Set by AssignRequestId middleware into Laravel's shared log context.

request_id.description: Alias — same value as requestId, present if set via event context.
